title: Public Policy Convergence Tracker
subtitle: Identity, Money, Governance, Security, Energy, Health, Food, Speech
purpose: A public-record tracker for policies, mandates, standards, pilots, contracts, treaties, and institutions that centralise identity, money, movement, speech, security, health, energy, land, food, and governance.
boundary: This tracker follows public records and institutional actions. It does not claim secret coordination. Each item must be linked to an actor, date, jurisdiction, source class, evidence level, and plain-language boundary.
sourceHierarchy: Law, regulation, treaty, court order, or official policy document
Government procurement, public contract, budget, hearing, or committee record
Central bank, BIS, IMF, World Bank, OECD, G20, or official monetary document
Corporate filing, annual report, procurement notice, or investor disclosure
NGO, foundation, standards-body, or public-private partnership document
Major dated reporting that links to source documents

signalLevels.name: Mention
signalLevels.meaning: The topic appears in a source and is tracked as a lead.

signalLevels.name: Pilot
signalLevels.meaning: A sandbox, trial, grant, or memorandum exists.

signalLevels.name: Procurement
signalLevels.meaning: Money, vendors, standards, or implementation plans are visible.

signalLevels.name: Mandate
signalLevels.meaning: A rule, law, treaty, or institutional requirement exists.

signalLevels.name: Integration
signalLevels.meaning: Two or more systems connect, such as identity, money, health, travel, speech, policing, or AI.

signalLevels.name: Lock-in
signalLevels.meaning: Opt-out becomes difficult because services, travel, work, money, or compliance depend on the system.

lanes.title: Agenda 2030 / Global Standards / Policy Harmonisation
lanes.plainEnglish: Track how broad international goals, standards, treaties, model laws, funding conditions, and public-private partnerships become domestic policy.
lanes.readerQuestion: Are national policies being aligned through global standards without clear democratic oversight?

lanes.title: Digital ID / Biometrics / Identity Wallets
lanes.plainEnglish: Track when identity becomes the gate to banking, travel, health records, government services, age verification, work, benefits, or online access.
watchFor: ID linked to benefits or bank access
lanes.readerQuestion: Is identity becoming a master permission key?

lanes.title: CBDC / Tokenized Money / Programmable Finance
lanes.plainEnglish: Track when money becomes programmable, identity-linked, surveilled, restricted, or routed through central-bank and compliance rails.
lanes.readerQuestion: Is money becoming a permission layer?

lanes.title: War / Security / Emergency Powers
lanes.plainEnglish: Track when war, cyber threats, terror threats, pandemics, climate emergencies, migration crises, or energy shocks expand permanent security powers.
watchFor: foreign threat used for domestic surveillance
war narrative tied to speech restrictions
lanes.readerQuestion: Is crisis converting civilian life into permanent security architecture?

lanes.title: Speech / Platforms / Search / Payment Access
lanes.plainEnglish: Track rules and partnerships that shape what can be posted, searched, ranked, monetised, advertised, or paid for online.
watchFor: state requests routed through third parties
lanes.readerQuestion: Is speech control being routed through platform and payment infrastructure?

lanes.title: Health Governance / Biosecurity / Emergency Health Powers
lanes.plainEnglish: Track when health systems connect to identity, travel, work, emergency law, procurement, data systems, and speech policy.
watchFor: health status tied to travel or work
health data linked to digital ID
lanes.readerQuestion: Is public health becoming a governance operating system?

lanes.title: Climate / Energy / Carbon / Mobility
lanes.plainEnglish: Track when climate and energy policy move into travel limits, energy rationing, consumption scoring, land controls, ESG finance, carbon markets, food policy, and mobility rules.
lanes.readerQuestion: Are energy and climate systems becoming a behaviour-management layer?

lanes.title: Migration / Borders / Biometric Travel
lanes.plainEnglish: Track how border systems, biometrics, digital identity, international law, NGOs, labour markets, housing pressure, and security narratives reshape movement and citizenship.
watchFor: security incidents used for broad powers
lanes.readerQuestion: Is movement being managed through identity, biometric, and security infrastructure?

lanes.title: Food / Water / Land / Supply Chains
lanes.plainEnglish: Track when farms, land, water, seed, fertilizer, meat, logistics, food standards, and supply chains concentrate into corporate-state policy networks.
lanes.readerQuestion: Are food and land systems becoming control infrastructure instead of local resilience?

crossLinks.meaning: Identity wallet becomes payment or bank gate
Carbon or energy rules can become payment or consumption restrictions
Climate policy reshapes farming, land, food and water
Global standards can route into domestic mandates, procurement, and funding rules

readerMethod: Find the lane before drawing conclusions.
Attach actor, date, jurisdiction, source class, signal level, and boundary.
A speech is level 1, a pilot is level 2, a contract is level 3, a mandate is level 4, integration is level 5, lock-in is level 6.
When three or more lanes converge around one actor, law, platform, crisis, or institution, flag it as a convergence event.
Track institutions, offices, corporations, laws, money, contracts, and named public actors; do not blame populations.
